case_title: YING JIE YU VS. HENRY YU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COPY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 67593063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67593063), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE SERVED APR-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HENRY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 254 LEE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67628299)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HENRY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HENRY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ***$50.00*** (TRANSACTION ID # 67593063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67593063) AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HENRY
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YING JIE AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HENRY
